scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join(__dirname,'dist','assets'); const dest=path.join(__dirname,'..','public','assets'); if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f => { const s=path.join(src,f); if (fs.statSync(s).isFile()) fs.copyFileSync(s, path.join(dest, f)); }); console.log('Copied dist/assets to public/assets');"
